sarah-okonkwo.name: Sarah Okonkwo
sarah-okonkwo.bio: Chief Technology Officer at myaircraft.us. A&P with Inspection Authorization and 15 years in general aviation maintenance.

daniel-reyes.name: Daniel Reyes
daniel-reyes.bio: Leads AI and ML at myaircraft.us. Previously built document-understanding systems in regulated industries.

marcus-webb.name: Marcus Webb
marcus-webb.bio: Founder and CEO of myaircraft.us. Private pilot with instrument rating and an aircraft owner for over a decade.

lisa-chen.name: Lisa Chen
lisa-chen.bio: General counsel at myaircraft.us. Former FAA regulatory attorney.

tom-brandt.name: Tom Brandt
tom-brandt.bio: VP of Sales at myaircraft.us. CFI and former aircraft broker with 2,500+ hours.
